Ab?
Na.
Ab?

Peon is standing near a TV antenna, balancing himself on the terrace. He rubs tobacco on his palm. Behind him we see entire stretch of Balali, a village in Haryana.
Ab? MAHAVIR SINGH (V.O.) Reh theek tara ghumaveh na.
Peon hurriedly pops in tobacco and rotates the antenna.
Ab?

TV screen comes to life. An international wrestling match is going on. We see Mahavir Singh, a young man around 25-28 years old, looking at the TV from the window. A smile appears on his face.
Aa gya.
Seoul Olympics ke wrestling arena

Peon is holding the antenna, looking down.
Nichcheh aajau?
Na. Pakad keh khadiya reh.
Peon makes a face.
INT. OFFICE - CONTINUOUS
Mahavir Singh enters the office, his eyes are glued to the TV. A couple of his colleagues, working, look at him and shake their heads in disapproval.
Olympics ke 72 kilo category ka yeh final match russia aur america ke
pehelwano ke beech..aur dukh ki baat yeh hai ke bharat mein kushti itni lok priy hone ke bawajut olympics mein
On Mahavir Singh's face a super appears: Balali, Haryana, 1988.
Meddul toh apNe chhore bi la sakey-ain baisaab, par koi badhava de tab na. Match continues.
Na paise na phehsulty, kis tara jeet-thaingey meddul apNe chhore.
Harkindar Singh Bullar, a well built man comes and stands next
Moo chalaaNey se kusti jeetti jaatti na baisaab, toh aap toh kab kay meddul jeet chuke hottey. Mahavir Singh looks at him carefully.
Naya hai kay? Harkinder just nods.
Tabi main sochchun.
Kabhi akhaade main utar keh dekh langot ke pelle hawa tight ho
Mahavir Singh gives him a smile.
Aapki lagta-ai kai baar hui hai baisaab... hawa tight.
Akhada hotta na toh teri kar detta.
Akhade ki kay jaroorat hai.

Harkindar gets an arrogant smile on his face. Quick shots of tables getting shifted. We see few people in the office raise their heads to see what's going on. Mahavir Singh and Harkindar are taking off their shirts. More people are gathering around them. Mahavir Singh and Harkindar are rolling up their pants. Two wrestlers are coming face to face for a bout on TV. Mahavir Singh and Harkindar are coming face to face in office.
Now the moment we were all waiting for, the stage is all set for the big
fight, there is double excitement in the air. Both the wrestlers were walking for the fight.
COMMENTATOR 2 (V.O.)
Bilkul sahi kaha aapne tom, ek

Mahavir Singh and Harkindar lock hands and test each other. Harkindar still has an arrogant smile on his face. Suddenly Mahavir Singh brings him down with great force. A gasp travels amidst the crowd.
He is down he is down, russia ke pehelwaan ko palak jhapakte hi muh ki khaani padi. Over confidence kabhi kabhi nuksaan deyak saabit ho sakta hai.
Mahavir Singh offers his hand to Harkindar and pulls him up.
Mann me koi malal reh gaya ho to Ek baar aur kosis kar le.
Harkindar is more cautious now. His smile has vaNSAhed. But Mahavir Singh brings him down again, even more forcefully. People in the office watch it in awe.
Now the wrestlers are gearing up for
the next round
Haan tom shuru mein yeh miqabla jitna asaan lag raha tha yeh utna asaan hai
move, bahot hi shandaar move tha yeh,
samajh mein nahi mein nahi aaya kya
nahi thi ke russia ka pehelwaan itni jaldi chit ho jayega. What a match.
Mahavir Singh pulls up and apologetic looking Harkindar as people come close to them.
Dum hai tere main, state level
Arey Dil chhotta mat kar, national

level champion se haara-ai tu. Harkindar is surprised to hear it. Mahavir Singh picks up his shirt and walks towards the TV as he buttons it. As he stands and watches the match, a smile appears on his face. Title track kicks in.
Yo-ain maare tauji Mahavir Singh Phogaat... . Barson pelle pehalwanni
chhod chuke-ain par pehalwanni ne
INT./EXT. VARIOUS PLACES - DAY/NIGHT Credit titles appear. Dangal Title song
Mahavir Singh cycling towards an Akhada. Mahavir engrossed in watching two wrestlers fight it out in the
Langots hanging on clothes line. An akhada wall painted beautifully. Mud in akhada.
Mugdars arranged in an akhada. Desi push ups.

Wrestlers getting massage done. Wrestlers touching guru's feet. Wrestlers (all ages) putting mud on their bodies and foreheads. Wrestlers fighting it out in akhada. Guru watching them. Bouts continue. Wrestlers drinking milk. Mahavir Singh along with few others, watching a small kid fight with a bulkier kid at village chaupal. The smaller kid brings the bulkier kid down, much to Mahavir Singh's delight. Mahavir Singh turns to people around him.

Chota wala hi jeetega, yo dekh Siraph boddy baNaanne se koi pehalwaan nahi baN jaatta. idhar aa beta...Pehalwanni jo-ai na... vo khoon main hotti-ai bhaisaab... khoon main. Mahavir Singh takes out a ten rupee note and hands it to the winning kid.
Yo le, doodh pe leNa. Jeeta reh. Few more shots of wrestling.
Mahavir Singh watching kushti, looking pensive.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS PLACES - DAY/NIGHT
Mahavir Singh, 19 years old, is fighting at National championship. Mahavir Singh on podium, getting a medal. Mahavir Singh at home. His father is angry with him

Reh jab thaDi main rotti na hoggi toh meddul khaavega kay? Koi na poochchheh teri iss pehalwanni ko. Jo naukri mil ri-ai, chupchap kar ley. Mahavir Singh sitting sad in his house. Food is kept in front of him.
Mahavir Singh takes a bite from his plate.
INT. OFFICE - DAY
Mahavir Singh having food with Harkindar.
Tanneh pehalwanni kyon chhoddi?
Chhoddi nahi bai, chhodNi padgi. Pehalwanni main sohrat kamaai, ijjat kamaai, bas paise nai kama paaya. Naukri kar lee.
INT. OFFICE - DAY
Mahavir Singh standing, getting scolded by his boss. Boss leaves and Mahavir Singh looks around quietly.
Har pehalwan yo-ii soch keh akhade main utarta-ai kay woh des ke liye
kuch karaiga. Par des-ii
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Mahavir Singh is seeing his photographs hanging on the wall as a wrestler and his achievements in various places. There is a gold medal hanging there too. His pregnant wife comes in and sees him in a sombre mood. She goes and stand next to him. He looks at her.
Aap des ke liye meddul nai laa
Jo main karNa chahtta tha wohh mahara betta kar keh dikhaavehga. desh ke liye gold jeetega humara beta. Apna tiranga sabse upar lehravega tu dekh lena.
He then goes back to looking at his laurels.
EXT. AKHADA - DAY
Mahavir Singh is watching a bout. Same little boy comes running and tells him something. Mahavir Singh runs out.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - DAY
Mahavir Singh enters the house. His brother is sitting there with his son (3-4 year old Omkar).
Tauji ki halat uss student jaisi thi jiska board exam ka result aane waala ho.
Chinta na karo bhaisaab sab thik hojayega
A woman comes out of the house. They look at her. Mahavir Singh looks very excited.
Chhori hui-ai.
Mahavir Singh's smile drops. Brother taps on his shoulder to console him.
Tauji chhore ki ummeed laga keh baiTthe the, aa gi thi chhori. Brother turns to young Omkar.
BeheN aai-ai teri Omkar
Omkar looks happy. He looks at Mahavir Singh. Mahavir Singh tries to smile.
Main bheetar se khus tha. Aur Tauji sirf bhaar se.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS LOCATIONS - DAY/NIGHT
A man is whispering something in Mahavir Singh's ears. As he finishes Mahavir Singh's eyes sparkle.

Re uske baad kay tha bhai... gyaanniyon ka gyaan tha, tau-taai ka kaan tha, aur har kisi ke paas chhora paidda karNe ka achook plaan tha. A woman is advising Mahavir Singh's wife, as she makes cow dung

WOMAN KaaDi gaiya ko saphed til ke laaddoo baajre ki rotti main lapet keh ulte haath se suraj nikaDne se pehlle khila deNa... Chhora pakka. Mahavir Singh's wife is trying to feed a cow, the cow is not in a mood to oblige. An astrologer is telling Mahavir Singh.
Mahavir ek Putar mantar likh keh de ra-oon, sachche maNn se jaap karte rehnNa.
Mahavir Singh takes the paper and touches it to his eyes. Mahavir Singh rotating rudraksh mala while working in office.
Dekh betta Mahavir, kosish keval itwaar/sunday ko karNi-ai, baakki
Mahavir Singh and his wife are at a temple by the tree. Pandit hands him a laddoo. Mahavir asks him in gesture. Pandit gives a reassuring smile.
Na logon neh salaah deNi band kari na tau-tai neh maanni.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - NIGHT

Mahavir Singh is sitting with his 2 year old daughter Geeta in his lap. His brother and Omkar (now 5-6 years old) are sitting nearby. All the advisers along with other villagers are also present there.
Delivery ka din aa chuka tha, aur aaddha gaon bhi... chhora hoNe ka
Brother tells Geeta. MAN Bhai aaNe waaDa hai tera Geetta. khoob khelegi phir
Same mid-wife comes out.
Chhori hui-ai.
Mahavir Singh's face drops. People also look stunned.
Par na tauji ko chhora mila, na gaon waaDon ko credditt. Villagers chat and some start getting up to leave.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS LOCATIONS - DAY/NIGHT
Various men and women are telling where Mahavir Singh and his wife have gone wrong in their actions.

segment-speaker: COUSIN Par in achook samadhaanno main
segment-text: aakhir chook thi kiski? Woman telling others.

KaaDi gaiy kay dhokke main bhains ko khila di hoggi rotti, warna mahri mausi ki chhori ko dekho Rohtak waDi... teen saal mein teen chhore ho gaye... tandurust. Astrologer telling a handful of people at his place.
Ab maaDa ulti perehga toh rejult bhi ulta-ii aavehga. Old man telling others at chaupal. OLD MAN
Sayyam insaan ki lagaam-ai. Manne toh

Mahavir Singh is putting Geeta to sleep. Wife is with Babita.
Main aapko chhora na de paai.
Isemin teri galati thodi na hai .Galat mat samajh munneh. Geetta
aur Babitta donno-ii bhot

Geeta (12 yrs), Babita (10 yrs), 3rd daughter (5 yrs) are looking
We see close ups of smiling faces of Geeta and Babita.
Waqt beeta, Tauji ne zid pakad lee thi ki unhe ladka chahiye. We reveal Mahavir Singh (now 42 yrs) from behind one of the
girls. He is looking at them.
Par shayad bhagwan ne bhi zid pakad lee thi. Teesri bhi chhori hui aur chauthi bhi. iss baar toh main bhi bheetar se dukhi tha. We see close up of mother looking at the baby. She looks up and
looks at Mahavir Singh who doesn't look too happy. Omkar (now 15 yrs) is standing near Mahavir Singh, looking at
Wide shot of Mahavir Singh watching all this.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Mahavir Singh is taking off the photographs from the wall and putting them in a box. The wall is almost empty now as most of the photographs have landed in the box. Young Geeta comes to the window of the room.
KhaNa lag gya-ai papa.
Mahavir Singh looks at her and nods.
Hmmm.
Mahavir Singh then looks at the lone medal hanging on the wall. He takes it off too and puts it in the box.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS LOCATIONS - DAY/NIGHT
Mahavir Singh seems to have resigned to fate. Mahavir Singh having dinner. Geeta and Babita serving him.
MAHAVIR SINGH WIFE Re palat isse, jal jayegi iss tarah
Mahavir Singh is watching Geeta and Babita play hop skip and jump, skipping ropes etc.
Uske baad tauji ne chore ki umeed se aur apne sapne se dono se hi muh mod
Mahavir Singh is going to office, now on a scooter, ignoring
an akhada. A kid calls out for him. He ignores. Someone offering laddoo to Mahavir Singh in village market.
Ai Mahavir, chhora hua hai mujhe,

Mahavir Singh takes the laddoo with a smile. The man smiles back at him meaningfully as he looks at Geeta and Babita with Mahavir. Mahavir Singh walks away and the breaks the laddoo into two and offers it to Geeta and Babita. Mahavir Singh is sitting quietly on the terrace. Office. Harkinder (now 40 yrs) gestures Mahavir for a fight, he smiles faintly and goes back to work.
EXT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S HOUSE - EVENING
Mahavir Singh comes back home. Wife comes at the door. She looks worried. Mahavir Singh gestures her to ask what happened. She gestures back indicating him to come inside.
EXT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - CONTINUOUS

Mahavir Singh enters and stops on seeing something. Two men get up from the cot on seeing him. Two boys, around 13-14 years old are standing next to them, beaten and bruised. Their wives are standing behind them with ghoonghats over their faces. Younger daughters are also present there.
Dekkho na bhaisaab kitni buri tara se maara... aap bhi
Suja diya-ai maar maar keh.
Haan, suja diya-ai maar maar keh.
Mahavir Singh raises his hand to slap the cousin.
Re kyon maara? Cousin takes a defensive pose but gets slapped. Wife intervenes.
Maine na mara tau.
Mahavir Singh looks at his wife.
Geetta Babitta nain maara-ai.
Mahavir Singh is surprised. He looks at Geeta and Babita standing quietly in one corner and then looks back at the two boys who are bulkier than them. He then turns back to Geeta and
Shuruaat inne kari thi... manneh kutiya keh ra tha, Babitta neh kaminni... hamneh bhi dhar diye do-chaar. WOMAN 2
Itni si baat peh koi itna maarta-ai
Haan... itna toh nai maarNa chahiye tha. Bachchi samajh keh maaph kar do. Men and women walk out with their kids.
Aapki chhoriyaan-ai isliye chhod
Chal ...choriyon se pitt gaya
Mahavir Singh joins his hands as they walk past him. He sits on the cot and turns towards Geeta and Babita.
Idhar aao.
Geeta and Babita walk towards him, Babita taking shelter behind Geeta. They have tears in their eyes and look scared.
Aagge se nai maarengey Pappa.
Tch tch, pelleh yo batao maara kaise?
Geeta and Babita muster up courage. They start demonstrating their moves keeping cousin brother as the subject.
Usne Munneh kutiya bolo toh main to
chup re gi, lekin usne Babitta ko
diya... bas manneh lapek ke uske pet pe de dala ghusakar.
Idar se doosra waaDa bhi aa gya. Manneh uske baaD pakad keh nichheh patak diya aur peeT peh kohnni dhar dee. As Geeta and Babita demonstrate their moves on cousin, Mahavir
Singh watches them attentively, with an amused look on his face. Music kicks in.
COUSIN (V.O.) Kehtte-ain doobNe waaDe ko tinke ka
Mahavir Singh finally smiles.

Mahavir Singh is talking to his wife. Younger daughters are sleeping.
Main hamessa yo soch keh rotta raha kay chhora hotta toh des ke liye kusti main gold laatta. Par yo baat meri samaj main na aayi kay gold to gold hotta-ai, chhora laavey ya chhori.
Wife just looks at him stunned.
Aaj ke baad Geetta aur Babitta na choolla chaukka karaingi na jhaadoo pochcha... inke khoon main pehalwaanni-ai... aaj ke baad yo sirph pehalwanni karengi.
Wife just looks at him.
EXT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - MORNING
Mahavir Singh is bathing by the hand pump while his wife is filling the bucket.
Pehalwanni toh siraph chhore karte-ain.
Mahri chhoriyaan chhoron se kam thode na-ain. Mahavir Singh gets up and dries himself. Wife tells herself.
Manneh toh na dekha aaj tak chhoriyon ko pehalwanni karte.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - NIGHT
Wife is making roti, lost in her thoughts. She puts in a roti on Mahavir Singh's plate.
GaonwaaDe kay bollaingeh?
Kab tak bollaingeh?
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S BEDROOM - NIGHT
Wife is awake. Mahavir Singh's eyes are closed.
Choriyo Ke Haath pair toot gay toh?
Judwa lenge.

Mahavir Singh is leaving for office. Wife hands him tiffin.
Paise kaan se aayenge?

Pata ni.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S STORE ROOM - NIGHT
Mahavir Singh is cleaning a Mugdar. Wife comes to the door. WIFE
ApNe junoon ke liye chhoriyon ki
Bas ek saal dedde munneh... Ek saal tak tu apNe kalejje peh paththar rakh le. Agar galat saabbitt ho gya to main jindagi bhar apNe kalejje peh paththar rakh loonga. Wife keeps quiet.
INT. GEETA BABITA ROOM - NIGHT
Mahavir Singh walks up to Geeta and Babita. They are playing a board game. They get up on seeing Mahavir Singh.
Kal subah paanch baje taiyaar rehNa.
Kyon pappa?
Tum donno ko gol-gappe khilaNey-ain.
Geeta and Babita smile nervously. Mahavir Singh smiles back.
Paanch baje... haan?
Geeta and Babita nod. Mahavir Singh walks out. Geeta and Babita look at each other and wonder.
Ab kay kar diya tanneh?
Munneh laga aapnneh kuch kara-ai /kara hogga. Both wonder.
INT. MAHAVIR SINGH'S COURTYARD - EARLY MORNING
Close-up of two donas with pani puri. Geeta and Babita looking at them. They then look up. There is a pani puri guy standing there. Mahavir Singh is looking at them. Wife is standing nearby.
Khaao.
Geeta and Babita pick up the donas and start eating.
Kaise-ain?
Teekkha thoda kam-ain pappa.
Haan bhai thoda aur teekkha baNa de. Gol-gappa guy adds spice. Babita likes it.
Jitna khaaNa hai abhi kha lo. Geeta and Babita stop eating.
Kyonki aaj se tum donno pehalwaano ki jindagi jiyogi.
Geeta and Babita are stunned to hear it. They look at their mother. She keeps a straight face.
Aur pehalwaano ko gol-gappe, achaar, chooraN, chatpata... jo sab tum donno ko pasand-ai na, woh sab khaaNa mana hai.
Geeta and Babita look nervous. Gol-gappa guy offers them more
Aaj ke baad na milaingey.
Babita extends her hand. While Geeta just looks at her.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS LOCATIONS - DAY/NIGHT Mahavir Singh starts girls' training.
Chal chal aur tej bhaag babita rukna nahi hai
Mahavir Singh near parked scooter. Geeta Babita doing rounds.
Pappa, salwar-kameej main bhaagga
Mahavir Singh is thinking.
Song Bapu sehat ke liye tu toh haanikarak hai
Omkar grudgingly parting with his shorts and t shirts. Mahavir Singh looks at the shorts.
Mother working on the shorts on sewing machine. Geeta Babita

and Omkar are watching it. Next morning Geeta and Babita come out of their room, wearing shorts and feeling odd. Mahavir Singh gestures them to move. Geeta Babita running in shorts across chaupal and market. Villagers watch. They are given different exercises. Made to pull buckets.
Geeta Babita sitting near canal. Tired, they stop. Then they spot Mahavir Singh arriving on scooter. They get up and run. Geeta is tired in class. On their way back from school they crib.
Do chhoron ko peetNe ki itni badi saja aaj tak poori vishv main kisi ko na mili hoggi.
Gaali toh usne munneh di thi na. Aapnneh haath uthaaNe ki kay jaroorat thi.
Ab bata ri-ai.
Geeta Babita watching TV. Mahavir Singh comes and switches it off and looks at them.
They go through evening training on terrace.

Dinner time. Babita reaches out for achaar. Mahavir Singh looks at her and she opts for salad instead. Early morning. Wife giving milk to Geeta and Babita, they make faces. Geeta Babita running in morning. Omkar laughs at them.
Geeta and Babita crossing pani puri stall with Mahavir Singh.
Mahavir Singh takes a deep breath. Mahavir Singh starts preparing an akhada in a field. Girls request their mother to save them from the regime while pressing her feet at night.
Tu jo bhi kehvehgi hum sab karenge mummy.
Bas iss pehalwanni se bacha le. WIFE Saal bhar ke liye bhool jao ki thari koi ma-ai.
Geeta and Babita stop pressing her leg and walk away. Mother is surprised.
Reh... itni jaldi bhool geen. Mahavir Singh takes the girls to a local akhada. Girls are made to wait outside.
Inside the Akhada, the guru and other wrestlers have an amused smile on their faces as Mahavir Singh stand in front of them.
Arre yo kay keh ra-ai Mahavir.
Babita... pair thamegi mere?
Main bhi tanne yahi poochne wali thi Mahavir Singh continues to build akhada.
Mahavir Singh finally gets Geeta and Babita into akhada. Before he enters the akhada he touches mud as if touching someone's feet.
ApNi maatti ki hamessa ijjat karNa. Kyonkay jitni ijjat tum maatti ki

He shows Geeta and Babita some moves. Geeta and Babita watch him closely. He then makes Geeta and Babita enter the akhada. Geeta and Babita touch the mud as they enter the akhada. He makes them fight against each other but soon realizes that these girls need stronger opponents for better training.
Tauji Geetta aur Babitta ko akhade tak toh le aaye the... par ek kami
najar aa ri thi. Geetta aur Babitta ko tagdi practice karNe ke liye tagde
pehalwanno ke sath ladNe ki zaroorat
INT. BROTHER'S HOUSE - DAY
Mahavir Singh's brother looks surprised. Omkar is standing there with a tray in his hand, carrying lassi.
Omkar? Apna Omkar?
Mahavir Singh nods. Omkar looks nervous.
Yo kay keh rayo bhaisaab. Chhoriyoon se pehalwanni karwa ray-oo, yo kum tha kay, jo ab chhoroon ke saath pehalwanni karwaaoge.
Omkar gulps down his saliva.
Haan kay na? BROTHER Haan bolNe ka ji na-ai bhaisaab, aur
na bolNe ki himmat na-ai.
Toh bhej de.
Mahavir Singh walks out. Brother and Omkar look at him.
INT./EXT. VARIOUS PLACES - DAY/NIGHT
Cousin brother joins the training. They are running in fields early in the morning.
Tum donno ke chakkar main meri class phreephund mein laggi.
Ro kyun ra-ai? Teri toh sirph class lagi-ai, mahra toh syllabbus-ii badal gaya-ai. Chal daud.
Pappa bhi training kay liye kisneh pakad keh laaye-ain. Yo bavdi booj kay makhkhi maarehga.
Yo toh munneh K2J2 laaggeh-ai.
K2j2 matlab.
Khoon kam, jor jaada.
They burst out laughing while cousin gives them glares. Cousin brother enters akhada with Geeta. He thrashes her easily.
K2j2 hain?
Dekh choti bhen hoon teri
Cousin then thrashes Babita also. He is all smiles. Mahavir Singh watches all this quietly. Geeta and Babita are full of mud, including their hair.
Bura ni maanna Tauji, chhoriyaan thodi kamjor-ain.
Mere saath ladehga?
Cousin shows him his pinky.
abhi aaya Tauji.
And he runs away.
Fades to

Geeta and Babita fast asleep, tired. Mahavir Singh enters the room and sits next to Geeta. He looks at them lovingly and then he starts pressing their feet. His wife enters the room and is surprised to see him do so.
Aapka dil ka samajh nai aatta.
Ek waqat pe main ya toh inka guru ho sakta hoon, ya baap. Jahan guru hogga na, waan baap ni ho sakta.
Wife just looks at him.
INT. AKHADA - MORNING
Omkar and Geeta have their arms locked.
K2J2 bolNe ke liye sorry.
Sorry!!!
Omkar thrashes her again. Mahavir Singh gets angry.
Majaak laga rakha-ai kay? Geeta and Babita are stunned.
Wo tenneh patakni de ra-ai aur tu kha ri-ai. Geeta keeps quiet.
Left side peh patak ra-ai toh left side peh jor de keh kyon na rokti usneh.
Sorry pappa.

Chal, pher jor laga.
Arey jaan na hai ke tere mein?

Wife is having an argument with Mahavir Singh.
Aap chhoriyon se pehalwaanni kara ray-oo manneh kuch na bolla, lekin mere chaukeh main murga na baNega... bass.
Samjhya kar, pehalwaanno ko protein

Tu chatti-ai teri chhoriyaan kamjor pehalwaan baNein? WIFE Main kuch ni jaaNti. Mere chaukke

Reh Omkar, choollah baNaana aatta-ai tunneh?
Nahi tauji.

Doodh baadam ghee ke paise poore na

Matlab Sau rupeh ka chickun bees

Cousin is blowing air into choolah. His eyes are burning. Mahavir Singh is cutting chicken into pieces. Geeta and Babita are watching from a distance. Wife comes with a kadhai and puts it on the choolah.
Pyaaj bhooN diya-ai. Aur yo kadaayi waappus mere chaukke main na

ChawaD ke sath khaattey-ain.
